channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The ‘internet of beings’ is the next fronteir that could change humanity and healthcare
item.description: In the 1966 film Fantastic Voyage, a spacecraft and its crew are shrunk to microscopic size and injected into the body of an injured astronaut to remove a life-threatening blood clot from his brain.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: DoorDash launches Zesty, an AI app for finding local food
item.description: DoorDash launches Zesty, an AI-powered social app that recommends restaurants through conversational search, now testing in San Francisco and New York.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: I'm slashing my streaming bills by 56% in 2026 – here's my five-step masterplan
item.description: Five ways to cut the cost of Netflix, Disney+ and more by selectively subscribing and cutting unnecessary options.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch The Hunting Wives online for FREE from anywhere
item.description: Want to watch The Hunting Wives for FREE from anywhere? Stream every new twist as Sophie is drawn into betrayal, hidden agendas, and a fight to prove her innocence.
item.dc:creator: Krishi Chowdhary, TechRadar

item.title: Apple's iPad in 2025: the highs, lows, and what we want to see in 2026
item.description: Apple’s 2025 iPad lineup wasn’t about flashy redesigns, but meaningful performance upgrades and the arrival of iPadOS 26 combined to deliver the most complete iPad experience yet.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Krol, TechRadar

item.title: ServiceNow $12 billion deal spree is ‘deja vu’ of CEO’s SAP days
item.description: After years of eschewing big mergers, ServiceNow Inc. is on a deal spree. It has spent at least $12 billion this year on acquisitions or strategic investments.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: ChatGPT's GPT-5.2 is here, and it feels rushed
item.description: GPT-5.2 is now live for all ChatGPT users with improved coding, writing and image interpretation, with Kurt Knutsson offering his review.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Acemagic just launched one of the weirdest-looking Ryzen AI Max+ 395 mini PCs to date - Tank M1A Pro+ supports 24TB storage, quad 8K screens and claims to match the RTX 4070M laptop GPU
item.description: Acemagic’s Tank M1A Pro+ joins the Ryzen AI Max+ 395 mini PC wave with support for four 8K screens, 128GB memory and up to 24TB SSD storage.
item.dc:creator: Wayne Williams, TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft is not rewriting Windows in Rust
item.description: A job posting by a Microsoft engineer sparked excitement about a project “to eliminate every line of C and C++ from Microsoft by 2030”, replacing it with Rust — but alas for fans of the memory-safe programming language, it turns out this is a personal goal, not a corporate one, and Rust isn’t necess
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 4 ways the CIO role will expand in 2026
item.description: The CIO role is undergoing its most dramatic transformation in years. Technology leaders previously focused on digital transformation and cloud migration are now being handed responsibility for corporate sustainability, AI governance, and strategic platform consolidation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why Waymo went down in San Francisco
item.description: Last weekend, a gnarly power outage in San Francisco took out a number of traffic lights, which, in turn, sent a number of self-driving Waymo robotaxis into a sort of fugue state.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: Army bucks trend, to move forward with $50B MAPS contract
item.description: Despite several agencies pausing or canceling large multiple award contracts, the Army decided to proceed with its MAPS vehicle for professional services. The post Army bucks trend, to move forward with $50B MAPS contract first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: This AI startup is extending an olive branch between humans and machines
item.description: In the fall of 2024, six college students joined forces to start an AI company together. Five of them had met while studying computer science, computer engineering, and electrical engineering at Georgia Tech in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: New SantaStealer malware is after your passwords and crypto
item.description: New SantaStealer malware reportedly threatens holiday shoppers with password theft. This Christmas-themed info-stealer targets browsers and crypto wallets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft previews C++ code editing tools for GitHub Copilot
item.description: Microsoft is providing early access to C++ code editing tools for GitHub Copilot via the Visual Studio 2026 Insiders channel.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Top 5 enterprise tech priorities for 2026
item.description: It’s the season for “looking ahead to next year” articles that tell some group or another what they should be doing or what some “expert” says they should do. Let’s take a different slant and focus on what one group— arguably the most important tech buyer group — actually says they’re going to do.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 6 AI breakthroughs that will define 2026
item.description: The most significant advances in artificial intelligence next year won’t come from building larger models but from making AI systems smarter, more collaborative, and more reliable.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Building AI agents the safe way
item.description: If you want to know what is actually happening in generative AI—not what vendors pretend in their press releases, but what developers are actually building—Datasette founder Simon Willison gets you pretty close to ground truth.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Free up iPhone storage by deleting large attachments
item.description: Free up iPhone storage fast by clearing large photos and videos from Messages app. Simple steps for iOS users to delete attachments without losing chats.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
